resources.string: We sent a 5-digit code to your phone number
The chat will be deleted from your device. This action can’t be undone.
From the comfort of your couch, post your request and let trusted professionals come to you, no calls, no stress.
Find What You Need in Seconds
Browse dozens of home services — from quick fixes to big projects. Just tap a category and get started instantly.
Receive multiple offers from nearby professionals, check their prices and ratings, then pick the one that suits you best.
occurred an error for sending otp
Enter your phone number to continue
I need help with a service
Please check your connection and try again. We\'ll keep trying in the background.
Once you start accepting or posting requests, chats with craftsmen will appear here.
How would you like to use San3a?
What do you usually need help with?
You can switch roles anytime from your profile.
This helps us personalize your experience. You can change it anytime.
Choose your specialties to get relevant job requests. You can change this later.
Location helps improve accuracy, but don’t worry, you can update it later.
Add photos or a video of your past work. This helps build trust with customers.
We’ll use this to personalize your experience. You can add a profile photo too, or skip for now.
Uploading your ID helps build trust with customers. Verified craftsmen get more jobs and a special badge on their profile.
You can mention your years of experience, tools you use, or types of jobs you usually handle.
Our team is working on a fix. Please try again later.

Welcome to San3a! By using our mobile application, you agree to the following terms:


1. Account Eligibility
 You must be at least 18 years old to create an account and use San3a. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure.


2. Account Types
 Users may register as either a Customer or a Craftsman. You can switch between roles at any time, but must provide accurate information for each profile type.

 3. Service Requests and Offers
 Customers can post service requests, including descriptions, photos, and locations. Craftsmen can respond to requests by submitting offers with pricing and timing. San3a is not a party to any agreement between customers and craftsmen.


4. Payment and Pricing
 San3a may offer in-app payment features or facilitate communication about payments. We are not responsible for pricing disputes or payment arrangements made outside the app.


5. User Conduct
 All users must: Provide accurate and honest information. Treat others respectfully and professionally. Refrain from using the app for illegal, abusive, or deceptive purposes.


6. Ratings and Reviews
 Both customers and craftsmen can leave ratings after a job is completed. Reviews must be fair, respectful, and based on real interactions.


7. Termination
 We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these terms.


8. Changes to Terms
 We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the app implies your acceptance of the updated terms.

We value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how San3a collects, uses, and protects your information.

 1. Information We Collect
 Personal Data: Name, phone number, location, profile photo, ID (for craftsmen).
 Usage Data: How you interact with the app, device type, IP address.
 Photos and Files: Only those you upload voluntarily for service requests or profile verification.

 2. How We Use Your Information
 To connect customers with suitable craftsmen.
 To improve app performance and user experience.
 To verify identities and prevent fraud.
 To send important updates or notifications.

 3. Data Sharing
 We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties except:
 When required by law.
 To enable in-app messaging and job assignment between users.
 For payment processing (if integrated).

 4. Location Data
 We collect your location to:
 Show you nearby services or job requests.
 Help you navigate to job locations.
 You can disable location sharing at any time in your device settings.

 5. Security
 We use encryption and secure storage methods to protect your data. However, no system is 100%% secure.

 6. Your Rights
 You can:
 Access and edit your profile at any time.
 Request deletion of your data by contacting us at [your support email].

 7. Policy Updates
 We may revise this policy from time to time. You will be notified of significant changes.
Create your craftsman account and get job requests.
We’ll keep you updated when there’s something new.
Create your craftsman account and get job requests.
Are you sure you want to logout?
You can always sign back in with your account.
I can fix this today. I have 10+ years experience with kitchen plumbing.
Professional plumber with quick response time. I can come today evening.
Experienced in residential plumbing. Available for urgent jobs right now.
